name: searxng-web-research
description: Search and fetch strategy for technical terms, standards, tools, hardware, software, and domain jargon.
instructions: Use this skill when web search is likely more useful than an encyclopedia. Build focused queries with the English term, domain clue, and target-language wording. Prefer official docs, standards, manuals, vendor docs, dictionaries, or high-quality technical references. If SearXNG returns zero results, try a shorter English query or a target-language query. If snippets are enough, do not fetch pages; if snippets only hint at the answer, fetch the best URL.

resources.name: search-query-patterns
resources.description: Query patterns and source ranking for SearXNG research.
